song.title: Abide in Thee
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Abide in Thee! In that deep love of Thine, My Jesus, Lord, Thou Lamb of God divine; Down, closely down, As living branch with tree, I would abide, my Lord, my Christ, in Thee.
[V2] 2) Abide in Thee! My Savior God, I know How love of Thine so vast in me may flow; My empty vessel, running o’er with joy, Now overflows to Thee without alloy.
[V3] 3) Abide in Thee! Nor doubt, nor self, nor sin Can e’er prevail With Thy blest life within; Joined to Thyself, Communing deep, my soul Knows naught besides Its motions to control.
[V4] 4) Abide in Thee! ’Tis thus I only know The secrets of Thy mind E’en while below— All joy and peace, And knowledge of Thy word, All pow’r and fruit, And service for the Lord.
song.author: Joseph Denham Smith
